name: Automotive Lockout Service
description: Be Secure Locksmith provides fast, damage-free car lockout service throughout Gainesville and Ocala. Our mobile technicians arrive fully equipped to unlock any vehicle make or model on-site.

name: Car Key Programming
description: We program transponder keys and smart keys for most domestic and foreign vehicles at your location. No dealership visit required — we handle the full cut-and-program process on-site.

name: Car Key Replacement
description: Lost or broken car keys replaced on-site for most makes and models. Be Secure Locksmith cuts and programs replacement keys at a fraction of dealership pricing.

name: Transponder Key Programming
description: Our technicians program chip keys to match your vehicle's immobilizer system for all major domestic and foreign manufacturers, completed at your location throughout North Central Florida.

name: Key Fob Programming
description: We replace and program key fobs for push-to-start and remote entry vehicles. New fobs are paired to your vehicle on-site — no tow truck or dealer visit needed.

name: Ignition Repair
description: Stuck key, worn cylinder, or faulty ignition switch diagnosed and repaired on-site. Be Secure Locksmith handles ignition repair for most vehicle makes throughout the Gainesville and Ocala service area.

name: Broken Key Extraction
description: Broken key stuck in your ignition or door lock removed safely without damaging the lock or cylinder. Available for homes, businesses, and vehicles throughout Gainesville and Ocala.

name: Emergency Lockout Service
description: Be Secure Locksmith dispatches immediately for home, vehicle, and business lockouts throughout Gainesville, Ocala, and surrounding Alachua and Marion County communities.

name: Home Lockout Service
description: Locked out of your Gainesville or Ocala home? Our mobile locksmiths provide fast, damage-free residential entry, available Monday through Saturday, 8am to 7pm.

name: Lock Rekeying
description: We rekey all major lock brands and door types so old keys no longer work. Recommended after moving, tenant turnover, or lost keys — faster and more affordable than full lock replacement.

name: New Lock Installation
description: We install deadbolts, handle sets, and entry locks on front doors, back doors, sliding glass doors, and windows in a range of brands, finishes, and security grades for Gainesville and Ocala properties.

name: Lock Repair
description: Damaged, worn, or misaligned locks repaired on-site. Be Secure Locksmith services all major lock brands for residential and commercial properties throughout North Central Florida.

name: Lock Change
description: Full lock replacement for doors where rekeying is not sufficient — damaged locks, security upgrades, and tenant changeovers. We install commercial-grade and residential locks for all door types.

name: Deadbolt Installation
description: Professional deadbolt installation for Gainesville and Ocala homeowners and businesses. We install ANSI Grade 1 and Grade 2 deadbolts from Schlage, Kwikset, and other leading brands.

name: High-Security Lock Installation
description: We install pick-resistant, bump-resistant high-security locks for residential and commercial properties. Brands include Medeco, Mul-T-Lock, and Schlage B-series.

name: Smart Lock Installation
description: Be Secure Locksmith installs and configures smart locks from Schlage, Kwikset, and Yale for Gainesville and Ocala homes and businesses — keyless convenience with app integration and remote access.

name: Keypad Lock Installation
description: We install standalone battery-operated keypad locks for homes and businesses — no subscription or network required. Ideal for rental properties, offices, and any door needing keyless entry.

name: Keyless Entry Installation
description: Battery-operated keyless entry locks installed on residential and commercial doors throughout Gainesville and Ocala. We handle everything from brand selection to final configuration.

name: Window Lock Installation
description: We install and replace window locks for homes and businesses throughout Alachua and Marion County. Sash locks, keyed window locks, and sliding window stops for all common window types.

name: Sliding Glass Door Lock Service
description: Sliding glass door locks replaced, repaired, or upgraded for Gainesville and Ocala homes. We service multi-point locks, foot locks, and bar locks for all major door brands.

name: Mailbox Lock Replacement
description: Lost your mailbox key? Be Secure Locksmith replaces mailbox locks quickly and affordably for homeowners and property managers throughout Gainesville and Ocala.

name: Key Duplication
description: On-site key duplication for residential, commercial, and high-security keys. We cut spare keys for family members, housekeepers, and emergency access at your location.

name: Car Key Cutting
description: Precision key cutting for standard, laser-cut, and high-security vehicle keys at your location anywhere in the Gainesville and Ocala service area.

name: Commercial Locksmith Services
description: Be Secure Locksmith serves offices, retail, restaurants, warehouses, and apartment complexes with commercial lock installation, rekeying, master key systems, and lockout response.

name: Commercial Lockout Service
description: Locked out of your Gainesville or Ocala business? We dispatch immediately and arrive equipped for commercial-grade locks with minimal disruption to your operations.

name: Master Key Systems
description: We design and install master key systems for businesses and multi-unit properties — one key for management, individual keys for staff, without sacrificing security.

name: Interchangeable Core Locks
description: Interchangeable core lock systems installed for commercial properties requiring frequent access changes. Cores swap in seconds without disassembling the lock hardware.

name: Property Management Locksmith Services
description: Be Secure Locksmith partners with Gainesville and Ocala property managers for unit rekeying, lock changes, and lockout response across multiple properties. Fast turnaround, consistent pricing.

name: Panic Bar Installation
description: Code-compliant panic bar installation for commercial doors throughout Gainesville and Ocala. We install and service all major brands and ensure compliance with Florida life safety requirements.

name: Panic Bar Repair
description: Malfunctioning panic bars and crash bars diagnosed and repaired on-site. Be Secure Locksmith services all major exit device brands for commercial buildings in North Central Florida.

name: Crash Bar Installation
description: We install crash bars and exit devices for commercial doors requiring code-compliant emergency egress hardware throughout Gainesville and Ocala.

name: Door Closer Installation
description: Commercial door closers installed and adjusted for proper latching and ADA-compliant closing force throughout the Gainesville and Ocala service area.

name: Door Closer Repair
description: Worn or malfunctioning door closers repaired or replaced on-site. Be Secure Locksmith services commercial door closers for all major manufacturers throughout North Central Florida.

name: Security Assessment
description: Every Be Secure Locksmith visit includes a complimentary security assessment. Our technician identifies vulnerabilities and provides honest recommendations with no obligation or upsell pressure.
